description: You are a data officer for the National Tuberculosis Programme of Sierra Leone preparing a quarterly cohort analysis report. Using DHIS2 at http://localhost:8080 (login: admin / district), export the TB programme patient working list for Western Area Urban district to /home/ga/Downloads/. Additionally, generate a bar chart showing TB programme case registrations (new enrollments) by month for Western Area Urban district for the year 2022. Save this visualization as a favorite named 'TB Notifications Western Area Urban 2022' and export its data as a CSV or Excel file to /home/ga/Downloads/.
